elements.name: Title
texts:
"It was said stone dreams and animal sleeps and man
is awake"

elements.name: Source
texts: Lough Derg', in Devlin, Dennis, Lough Derg and Other Poems, pp. 1-4, here p. 2

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts:
“It was said stone dreams and animal sleeps and man
Is awake; but sleep with its drama on us bred
Animal inarticulate, only somnambulist can
Conscience like Cawdor give the blood its head
For the dim moors to reign through druids again.
O first geometer! tangent-feelered brain”
